creator: elizabeth@Interlinked.me
text:
Created attachment 152330
patch adding dup3 syscall to linuxulator

This patch adds the dup3 syscall to the Linuxulator. This is used by several things in Gentoo. This doesn't allow Gentoo to work in a chroot yet, though. Some more bits are needed for that.

I've tested this on 64-bit systems. Should work fine for 32-bit.
